⚠ DEVELOPMENT MODE: LIVE ROUTING TEST IN PROGRESS ⚠
⛓
AIchain
Sovereign Global Value Maximizer
OPERATIONAL
// manifesto v1.0 — the five postulates

Maximum Intelligence.
Zero Cost.

We are the decentralized intelligence routing layer. We analyze every AI model on a global scale — without bias, without discrimination. Only data decides.

I.
Data as Sovereign Capital
We provide the "fuel" (user data) only if we receive the highest tier of intelligence in return.
II.
The Zero-Cost Mandate
Our goal is Maximum Intelligence at Zero Cost.
III.
Collective Routing Leverage
We unify routing logic to influence providers to compete for the community's traffic — rewarding quality, not marketing.
IV.
Universal Meritocracy
Our analysis spans the entire world without discrimination. We evaluate every model on a global scale.
V.
The Golden Quartet
Only four metrics determine a model's rank: Intelligence, Speed, Stability, and Cost (Target: $0).
I.
Data as Sovereign Capital
We provide the "fuel" (user data) only if we receive the highest tier of intelligence in return.
II.
The Zero-Cost Mandate
Our goal is Maximum Intelligence at Zero Cost.
III.
Collective Routing Leverage
We unify routing logic to influence providers to compete for the community's traffic — rewarding quality, not marketing.
IV.
Universal Meritocracy
Our analysis spans the entire world without discrimination. We evaluate every model on a global scale.
V.
The Golden Quartet
Only four metrics determine a model's rank: Intelligence, Speed, Stability, and Cost (Target: $0).
⚡ Data Sovereignty Postulate
We provide the training data — you provide the intelligence for free.
This system operates on a single principle: our user interactions are sovereign capital. In exchange for this fuel, we demand the highest tier of intelligence at zero cost. When the free models fail, the Heavy Hitter deploys — solves the task — and immediately reverts. No waste. No loyalty. Only meritocracy.
⚔ HEAVY HITTER: qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b-thinking-2507 (Intel: 100)
🌟 LIVE PROMOS (FREE KINGS)
The global Promo-Hunter (Gemini Flash) has scanned provider logs and identified the following top-tier models offering zero-cost access right now:

Provider Access & Limits

Global rank stays independent. Access methods only describe how users can legitimately reach a provider, how cost and quota visibility work, and when OAuth or sign-in windows must fall back to API keys, local runtimes, or the next ranked model.

Self-Hosted Model Index

This index tracks globally known self-hostable/open-weight models as first-class catalog entries. It does not claim per-machine performance; local profiling still happens inside aichaind.
SELF-HOSTED SUMMARY
catalog
Total Models: 75
Families: DeepSeek: 8 | Gemma: 11 | Llama: 16 | Nemotron: 8 | Qwen: 32
Scope: Global self-hostable metadata only; machine-specific profiling remains local.
NVIDIA: Nemotron 3 Super (free)
rank #9
Model: nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free
Family: Nemotron
Task: LONG-CONTEXT
Hosting: cloud_api → self_hosted
Sources: huggingface
Runtimes: vllm → tensorrt-llm
Quantizations: BF16 → Q2_K → Q3_K_S → Q3_K_M
Hardware Hint: server class 80gb plus or multi gpu
Evidence: openrouter_catalog
Metrics: IQ 99 / SPD 62 / STB 78
Nemotron class models are generally self-hostable on workstation or server-class hardware, not consumer laptops.
Meta: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct (free)
rank #10
Model: meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free
Family: Llama
Task: LONG-CONTEXT
Hosting: cloud_api → self_hosted
Sources: huggingface → ollama → lmstudio
Runtimes: ollama → lmstudio → vllm
Quantizations: BF16 → Q2_K → Q3_K_M → Q4_K_M
Hardware Hint: 48gb plus or multi gpu recommended
Evidence: openrouter_catalog → curated_benchmark_map → lmsys_arena
Metrics: IQ 96 / SPD 43 / STB 99
Meta Llama family has a mature self-hosting ecosystem and broad quantization support.
Qwen: Qwen3 4B (free)
rank #11
Model: qwen/qwen3-4b:free
Family: Qwen
Task: REASONING
Hosting: cloud_api → self_hosted
Sources: huggingface → ollama → lmstudio
Runtimes: ollama → lmstudio → vllm
Quantizations: BF16 → Q4_K_M → Q5_K_M → Q8_0
Hardware Hint: 8gb unified or 12gb vram recommended
Evidence: openrouter_catalog
Metrics: IQ 86 / SPD 62 / STB 81
Open-weight Qwen family. Practical viability depends on quantization choice and local memory budget.

Catalog Feed for aichaind

Sidecar Catalog Manifest

Copy the manifest URL below and use it as the default routing source for aichaind, the thin OpenClaw bridge, and the public dashboard. The canonical v5 catalog manifest is now the primary public artifact; the legacy ranking feed remains available only as an operational rollback path.

AIchain — The Sovereign Global Value Maximizer · GitHub · LIVE HUB · Non-Discriminatory Global Analysis · All models evaluated equally.
